parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ filterGroups: [{ filters: [{ propertyName: 'country', operator: 'NOT_HAS_PROPERTY' }] }], properties: ['name', 'domain'], limit: 100, ...($json.after ? { after: $json.after } : {}) }) }}

parameters.url: =https://r.jina.ai/https://duckduckgo.com/?q={{ encodeURIComponent($('Prepare Company Data').item.json.companyName + ' headquarters country location') }}

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ contents: [{ parts: [{ text: $json.prompt }] }], generationConfig: { temperature: 0.1 } }) }}
